title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people travelling by bus. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A young woman and a boy are sitting on a city bus. The boy is looking through the window while the woman is holding a shopping bag. There are other passengers, seats and buildings visible outside.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people washing a dog. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A father and his daughter are washing their dog in the garden. The girl is using a sponge and the father is holding a hose. There is a bucket, a towel, green grass and a fence behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
